name: Blog · Publicador
description: Cron 15min: claim 1 entry da queue, valida, gera .post.ts, commit via GitHub node nativo (file.edit), IndexNow, marca published e notifica Telegram (sucesso/falha).

parameters.query: WITH cand AS (SELECT q.id FROM blog_publish_queue q WHERE q.scheduled_for <= NOW() AND q.published_at IS NULL AND (q.attempt_started_at IS NULL OR q.attempt_started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM blog_publish_queue p2 WHERE p2.published_at IS NOT NULL AND (p2.published_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Recife')::date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Recife')::date) ORDER BY q.scheduled_for ASC FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1) UPDATE blog_publish_queue SET attempt_started_at = NOW(), attempt_count = attempt_count + 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cand) RETURNING id AS queue_id, draft_id, scheduled_for, attempt_count;
SELECT d.id, d.slug, d.pillar, d.title, d.content_json, q.id AS queue_id, q.attempt_count FROM blog_drafts d JOIN blog_publish_queue q ON q.draft_id = d.id WHERE q.id = $1 LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ host: "clinicaokazaki.com", key: $vars.INDEXNOW_KEY || "REPLACE_WITH_KEY", keyLocation: "https://www.clinicaokazaki.com/" + ($vars.INDEXNOW_KEY || "REPLACE_WITH_KEY") + ".txt", urlList: ["https://www.clinicaokazaki.com/blog/" + $('Gerar .post.ts + Validar').item.json.slug] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blog_publish_queue SET published_at = NOW(), github_commit_sha = $1, indexnow_status = $2, last_error = NULL WHERE id = $3; UPDATE blog_drafts SET status = 'published', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4;
UPDATE blog_publish_queue SET last_error = $1 WHERE id = $2;

parameters.text: ={{ "⚠️ Falha na publicação Slug: " + $('Gerar .post.ts + Validar').item.json.slug + " Etapa: commit GitHub Tentativa: " + $('Gerar .post.ts + Validar').item.json.attempt_count + " Erro: " + (($json.error && $json.error.message) ? $json.error.message : JSON.stringify($json).slice(0,200)) + " O Publicador tentará novamente em ~5 min." }}

parameters.content:
## Blog Publicador

Cron */15min: tenta publicar 1 entry due da fila.

Lock pessimista (FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) + cap 1/dia BRT.

Credentials: Supabase Blog Postgres, GitHub Blog API (predefined GitHub credential, fine-grained PAT com Contents: Write), Telegram Blog Bot.

Grupo Telegram chat_id: -5152728039

Var de ambiente n8n: INDEXNOW_KEY (32 chars random; arquivo correspondente em packages/site/public/<KEY>.txt).

GitHub node em modo onError continueErrorOutput — output 1 (success) -> indexNow, output 2 (error) -> recordError.

parameters.query: WITH cand AS (SELECT q.id FROM blog_publish_queue q WHERE q.scheduled_for <= NOW() AND q.published_at IS NULL AND (q.attempt_started_at IS NULL OR q.attempt_started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM blog_publish_queue p2 WHERE p2.published_at IS NOT NULL AND (p2.published_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Recife')::date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Recife')::date) ORDER BY q.scheduled_for ASC FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1) UPDATE blog_publish_queue SET attempt_started_at = NOW(), attempt_count = attempt_count + 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM cand) RETURNING id AS queue_id, draft_id, scheduled_for, attempt_count;
SELECT d.id, d.slug, d.pillar, d.title, d.content_json, q.id AS queue_id, q.attempt_count FROM blog_drafts d JOIN blog_publish_queue q ON q.draft_id = d.id WHERE q.id = $1 LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ host: "clinicaokazaki.com", key: $vars.INDEXNOW_KEY || "REPLACE_WITH_KEY", keyLocation: "https://www.clinicaokazaki.com/" + ($vars.INDEXNOW_KEY || "REPLACE_WITH_KEY") + ".txt", urlList: ["https://www.clinicaokazaki.com/blog/" + $('Gerar .post.ts + Validar').item.json.slug] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE blog_publish_queue SET published_at = NOW(), github_commit_sha = $1, indexnow_status = $2, last_error = NULL WHERE id = $3; UPDATE blog_drafts SET status = 'published', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4;
UPDATE blog_publish_queue SET last_error = $1 WHERE id = $2;

parameters.text: ={{ "⚠️ Falha na publicação Slug: " + $('Gerar .post.ts + Validar').item.json.slug + " Etapa: commit GitHub Tentativa: " + $('Gerar .post.ts + Validar').item.json.attempt_count + " Erro: " + (($json.error && $json.error.message) ? $json.error.message : JSON.stringify($json).slice(0,200)) + " O Publicador tentará novamente em ~5 min." }}
